text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, as I'm heading home after work, I
come across Sakura Chiyono O peering curiously
at something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh... I thought I heard a familiar voice coming
from the kitchen, so...
BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BANG!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? HA HA HA HA! Looks like you've caught me
red-handed in the midst of my secret training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! I-is all that black stuff... burned sweets?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want to give some to my sister, so I'm putting in
extra Bakushin effort!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other day, Sakura Bakushin O walked off
saying she'd realized what her sister needed—and
that she had to prepare it alone.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So you're saying what she needs...
choice_data_list: ...Is homemade sweets from her big sister?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Talking about it the other day brought
back memories of the first time I tried to bake
sweets like her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They turned out just as badly as they did today!
But when she saw me down in the dumps, you
know what she said?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Aw, Big Sis! Delicate work's really not your strong
suit, huh? But that's why I love them—they remind
me of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! That's all there is to it! Baking,
running—it's all about doing it your own way!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My sister doesn't need to copy my Bakushin. She
just has to run like herself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll get that across by giving her these sweets that
I baked my own way...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Crammed full of my love and support!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It seems you were right to believe in her, Trainer.
Hehe. Shall we be on our way?
choice_data_list: Yeah. I think she'll be just fine.
Yeah. I think she'll be just fine.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A pick-me-up? Oh! These sweets—you
made them yourself, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Crunch... Hehe... hahaha! Talk about bitter! They're just how I remember!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
These sweets are your answer, dear sister. They're
nothing like what you can make, but that's just
fine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your running isn't like mine—and that's fine too!
Don't let Bakushin hold you back!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best for the race! I'm gonna go all-out
Bakushin, just like you!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! I've gotta Bakushin... even harder!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There are sweets only you can make. The same
goes for your running.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My running is Bakushin. But that doesn't have to
be true for you.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Just like your sweets... I have my own running
style?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: I get it. I'm not you, or anyone else. I'm me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: I want to win a race... and I'll do it my way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, another Horsegirl Kids Footrace Meet
rolls around. How will the results turn out this
time?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Yes! Second place! Can you believe it?! She
came in second place!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Big Siiis! I did iiit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the questionable quality of the sweets,
they helped the sisters get through to each other.
Now their bond is deeper than ever.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Look, she came sixth! She worked so hard,
and it paid off!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Big Siiis! I did it! I ran my own way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the questionable quality of the sweets,
they helped the sisters make a breakthrough.
Now, step by step, they're making progress.
